<?php

class Solution {
    public function reinitializePermutation($n) {
        $nums = array();
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $nums[$i] = $i;
        }

        $count = 1;
        while (true) {
            $newNum = array();
            for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
                if ($i % 2 == 0) {
                    $newNum[$i] = $nums[$i / 2];
                } else {
                    $newNum[$i] = $nums[$n / 2 + ($i - 1) / 2];
                }
            }
            
            $nums = $newNum;

            if ($this->check($nums)) {
                break;
            }
            $count++;
        }
        
        return $count;
    }

    private function check($nums) {
        for ($i = 0; $i < count($nums); $i++) {
            if ($nums[$i] != $i) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }
}

class Solution {

    public function isPossible($x, $y, $a, $b) {
        $k = $this->gcd($a, $b);
        $m = $this->gcd($x, $y);
        if ($k == $m) {
            return 1; // means it's possible
        } else {
            return 0; // means it's not possible
        }
    }

    private function gcd($num1, $num2) {
        while ($num2 != 0) {
            $tmp = $num2;
            $num2 = $num1 % $num2;
            $num1 = $tmp;
        }
        return $num1;
    }
}

class Solution {

    function countWays($N, $S) {
        $true = array();
        $false = array();
        
        for ($i = 0; $i <= $N; $i++) {
            $true[$i] = array_fill(0, $N + 1, 0);
            $false[$i] = array_fill(0, $N + 1, 0);
        }
        
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $N; $i++) {
            if ($S[$i - 1] == 'T') {
                $true[$i][$i] = 1;
            } else {
                $false[$i][$i] = 1;
            }
        }
        
        for ($length = 3; $length <= $N; $length += 2) {
            for ($start = 1; $start <= $N - $length + 1; $start += 2) {
                $end = $start + $length - 1;
                for ($k = $start + 1; $k < $end; $k += 2) {
                    $operator = $S[$k - 1];
                    if ($operator == '&') {
                        $true[$start][$end] += $true[$start][$k - 1] * $true[$k + 1][$end];
                        $false[$start][$end] += $true[$start][$k - 1] * $false[$k + 1][$end];
                        $false[$start][$end] += $false[$start][$k - 1] * $true[$k + 1][$end];
                        $false[$start][$end] += $false[$start][$k - 1] * $false[$k + 1][$end];
                    } else if ($operator == '|') {
                        $true[$start][$end] += $true[$start][$k - 1] * $true[$k + 1][$end];
                        $true[$start][$end] += $true[$start][$k - 1] * $false[$k + 1][$end];
                        $true[$start][$end] += $false[$start][$k - 1] * $true[$k + 1][$end];
                        $false[$start][$end] += $false[$start][$k - 1] * $false[$k + 1][$end];
                    } else if ($operator == '^') {
                        $true[$start][$end] += $true[$start][$k - 1] * $false[$k + 1][$end];
                        $true[$start][$end] += $false[$start][$k - 1] * $true[$k + 1][$end];
                        $false[$start][$end] += $true[$start][$k - 1] * $true[$k + 1][$end];
                        $false[$start][$end] += $false[$start][$k - 1] * $false[$k + 1][$end];
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        return $true[1][$N] % 1003;
    }
}

            $this->doInnerLoop($N);
            $this->printNewLine();
        }
    }
    
    private function doInnerLoop($N) {

            echo '* '; // Printing star with space
        }

class TreeNode {
    public $val;
    public $left;
    public $right;

    public function __construct($val) {
        $this->val = $val;
        $this->left = null;
        $this->right = null;
    }
}

function createBinaryTree($descriptions) {
    $map = array();

    foreach ($descriptions as $desc) {
        $parent = $desc[0];
        $child = $desc[1];
        $is_right = $desc[2];

        if (!isset($map[$parent])) {
            $map[$parent] = new TreeNode($parent);
        }

        if (!isset($map[$child])) {
            $map[$child] = new TreeNode($child);
        }

        if ($is_right == 0) {
            $map[$parent]->right = $map[$child];
        } else {
            $map[$parent]->left = $map[$child];
        }
    }

    foreach ($descriptions as $desc) {
        $child = $desc[1];
        if (isset($map[$child])) {
            unset($map[$child]);
        }
    }

    $root = reset($map); 
    return $root;
}

        echo $result . "\n";
    }

function calculateMovement($n, $m, $rb, $cb, $rd, $cd) {
    if ($cb <= $cd) {
        return handleCase1($n, $m, $rb, $cb, $rd, $cd);
    } else {
        return handleCase2($n, $m, $rb, $cb, $rd, $cd);
    }
}

function handleCase1($n, $m, $rb, $cb, $rd, $cd) {
    if ($rb <= $rd) {
        return min($rd - $rb, $cd - $cb);
    } else {
        return min(2 * $n - $rb - $rd, $cd - $cb);
    }
}

function handleCase2($n, $m, $rb, $cb, $rd, $cd) {
    if ($rb <= $rd) {
        return min(2 * $m - $cd - $cb, $rd - $rb);
    } else {
        return min(2 * $m - $cd - $cb, 2 * $n - $rb - $rd);
    }
}

class Solution {

    function maxOnes($Mat, $N, $M) {
        $max_sum = -1;
        $ind = -1;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $N; $i++) {
            $j = 0;
            for ($k = 0; $k < $M; $k++) {
                if (isset($Mat[$i][$k])) {
                    $j += $Mat[$i][$k];
                }
            }
            if ($j > $max_sum) {
                $max_sum = max($max_sum, $j);
                $ind = $i;
            }
        }
        return $ind;
    }
}

function compare($head1, $head2) {
    $str1 = '';
    $str2 = '';
    
    while ($head1 != null) {
        $str1 .= strval($head1->data);
        $head1 = $head1->next;
    }
    
    while ($head2 != null) {
        $str2 .= strval($head2->data);
        $head2 = $head2->next;
    }
    
    return doCompare($str1, $str2);
}

function doCompare($s1, $s2) {
    if ($s1 === $s2) {
        return '0';
    } elseif ($s1 > $s2) {
        return '1';
    } else {
        return '-1';
    }
}

class Node {
    public $data;
    public $next;

    public function __construct($data) {
        $this->data = $data;
        $this->next = null;
    }
}

function createList($arr) {
    $head = null;
    $current = null;
    
    foreach ($arr as $value) {
        $newNode = new Node($value);
        if ($head === null) {
            $head = $newNode;
            $current = $head;
        } else {
            $current->next = $newNode;
            $current = $current->next;
        }
    }

}

function f($x, $n, $a, $b) {
    $ans = 0;
    for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
        if ($a[$i] <= $x) {
            continue;
        }
        $ans += $b[$i];
    }
    if ($ans <= $x) {
        return 1;
    }
    return 0;
}

function bsearch($l, $r, $n, $a, $b) {
    $m = (int)(($l + $r) / 2);
    if (f($m, $n, $a, $b)) {
        if (f($m - 1, $n, $a, $b) == 0) {
            return $m;
        }
        return bsearch($l, $m - 1, $n, $a, $b);
    }
    return bsearch($m + 1, $r, $n, $a, $b);
}

function more($n, $chlist) {
    $string = '';
    $count = 0;
    $i = 0;
    while ($count < $n) {
        if ($i == count($chlist)) {
            $i = 0;
        }
        $string .= $chlist[$i];
        $count += 1;
        $i += 1;
    }
    return $string;
}

function translate($l) {
    $n = $l[0];
    $a = $l[1];
    $b = $l[2];
    $chlist = [];
    if ($a <= $b) {
        $j = 0;
    } else {
        $j = $n - $b;
    }
    $i = 97; 
    while ($j < $n && $i <= 122) {
        array_push($chlist, chr($i));
        $j += 1;
        $i += 1;
        if ($i == 123) {
            $i = 97; 
        }
    }
    if ($a <= $b) {
        $string = ''; 
        foreach ($chlist as $i) {
            $string .= $i;
        }
        return $string; 
    } else {
        return more($n, $chlist); 
    }
}

<?php

class Solution {
  
    public function deleteNode($cur) {
        if ($cur->next == null) {
            return;
        }
        
        $dele = $cur->next;
        
        $cur->data = $dele->data;
        
        $cur->next = $dele->next;
    }
}

class Node {
    public $data;
    public $next;

    public function __construct($data) {
        $this->data = $data;
        $this->next = null;
    }
}

function createLinkedList($arr) {
    $head = null;
    $tail = null;

    foreach($arr as $value) {
        $newNode = new Node($value);
        
        if ($head == null) {
            $head = $newNode;
            $tail = $newNode;
        } else {
            $tail->next = $newNode;
            $tail = $newNode;
        }
    }
    return $head;
}

function printLinkedList($head) {
    $currentNode = $head;
    
    while ($currentNode != null) {
        echo $currentNode->data;
        if ($currentNode->next != null) {
            echo " -> ";
        }
        $currentNode = $currentNode->next;
    }
    echo "\n";
}

function runExample() {
    $arrayData = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
    $head = createLinkedList($arrayData);
    
    echo "Original Linked List: ";
    printLinkedList($head);
    
    $solution = new Solution();
    $nodeToDelete = $head->next; // e.g., delete 2

function assignBikes($workers, $bikes) {
    $wl = count($workers);
    $bl = count($bikes);
    $dis = array();
    
    for ($i = 0; $i < $wl; $i++) {
        $dis[$i] = array();
        for ($j = 0; $j < $bl; $j++) {
            $dis[$i][$j] = abs($workers[$i][0] - $bikes[$j][0]) + abs($workers[$i][1] - $bikes[$j][1]);
        }
    }
    
    $visited = array_fill(0, $bl, false);
    return dfs($dis, 0, 0, $wl, $visited);
}

function dfs($dis, $sum, $start, $total, $visited) {
    if ($start == $total) {
        return $sum;
    }
    
    $res = PHP_INT_MAX; 
    for ($i = 0; $i < count($visited); $i++) {
        if (!$visited[$i]) {
            $visited[$i] = true;
            $res = min($res, dfs($dis, $sum + $dis[$start][$i], $start + 1, $total, $visited));
            $visited[$i] = false;
        }
    }
    return $res;
}

function maximumGroups($grades) {
    $N = count($grades);
    $left = 1; 
    $right = $N + 1; 
    
    while ($right - $left > 1) {

            $left = $mid; 
        } else {
            $right = $mid;

    }

class Solution {

    public function possibleBipartition($N, $dislikes) {
        $graph = [];
        
        foreach ($dislikes as $pair) {
            $u = $pair[0];
            $v = $pair[1];
            if (!isset($graph[$u])) {
                $graph[$u] = [];
            }
            if (!isset($graph[$v])) {
                $graph[$v] = [];
            }
            $graph[$u][] = $v;
            $graph[$v][] = $u;
        }
        
        $color = [];
        
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $N; $i++) {
            if (!array_key_exists($i, $color)) {
                $ret = $this->dfs($graph, $i, $color, 'R');
                if (!$ret) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

    private function dfs($graph, $i, &$color, $currentColor) {
        $color[$i] = $currentColor;
        $complementaryColor = ($currentColor === 'B') ? 'R' : 'B';
        
        foreach ($graph[$i] as $neighbor) {
            if (array_key_exists($neighbor, $color)) {
                if ($color[$neighbor] === $currentColor) {
                    return false;
                }
            } else {
                $res = $this->dfs($graph, $neighbor, $color, $complementaryColor);
                if (!$res) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }
        return true;
    }
}

class Solution {

    private $visited;
    private $toList;
    private $group;

    public function dfs($cur) {
        foreach ($this->toList[$cur] as $to) {
            if (!in_array($to, $this->visited)) {
                $this->visited[] = $to;
                $this->dfs($to);
            }
        }
    }

    public function makeConnected($n, $con) {
        if (count($con) < $n - 1) {
            return -1;
        }
        
        $this->group = 0;
        $this->visited = [];
        $this->toList = [];
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $this->toList[$i] = [];
        }
        
        foreach ($con as $pair) {
            $s = $pair[0];
            $t = $pair[1];
            $this->toList[$s][] = $t;
            $this->toList[$t][] = $s;
        }
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if (!in_array($i, $this->visited)) {
                $this->visited[] = $i;
                $this->group++;
                $this->dfs($i);
            }
        }
        
        return $this->group - 1;
    }
}

class Solution {

    public function maxValue($arr, $N) {
        $max1 = -100000000.0;
        $min1 = 100000000.0;
        $max2 = -100000000.0;
        $min2 = 100000000.0;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $N; $i++) {
            $t1 = $arr[$i] + $i;
            $t2 = $arr[$i] - $i;

            $max1 = $this->myMax($max1, $t1);
            $min1 = $this->myMin($min1, $t1);
            $max2 = $this->myMax($max2, $t2);
            $min2 = $this->myMin($min2, $t2);
        }

        return $this->myMax($max1 - $min1, $max2 - $min2);
    }

    private function myMax($a, $b) {
        if($a > $b) {
            return $a;
        }
        return $b;
    }

    private function myMin($a, $b) {
        if($a < $b) {
            return $a;
        }
        return $b;
    }
}

class Solution {

    function splitIntoFibonacci($s) {
        $result = $this->dfs(0, $s, []);
        return $result ?: [];
    }

    function dfs($start, $string, $sequence) {
        if ($start == strlen($string)) {
            if (count($sequence) > 2) {
                return $sequence;
            }
            return null;
        }

        $num = 0;

        for ($i = $start; $i < strlen($string); $i++) {
            if ($i != $start && $string[$start] == '0') {
                return null;
            }

            $num = $num * 10 + ord($string[$i]) - ord('0');
            
            if ($num >= 2147483648) {
                break;
            }

            if (count($sequence) > 1 && end($sequence) + prev($sequence) != $num) {
                continue;
            }

            $sequence[] = $num;

            $seq = $this->dfs($i + 1, $string, $sequence);
            if ($seq != null) {
                return $seq;
            }

            array_pop($sequence);
        }
        return null;
    }
}

function solve() {
    $n = (int) trim(fgets(STDIN));
    $l = array_map('intval', str_split(trim(fgets(STDIN))));
    $divisors = array();
    $total = array_sum($l);
    
    for ($j = 2; $j <= floor(sqrt($total)); $j++) {
        if ($total % $j === 0) {
            array_push($divisors, $j);
            if ($j !== $total / $j) {
                array_push($divisors, $total / $j);
            }
        }
    }
    
    if ($total === 0) {
        echo 'YES' . PHP_EOL;
        return;
    }
    
    if ($total !== 1) {
        array_push($divisors, 1);
    }
    
    foreach ($divisors as $x) {
        $search = $x;
        $index = 0;
        $summ = 0;
        
        while ($index < $n) {
            $summ += $l[$index];
            if ($summ > $search) {
                break;
            } elseif ($summ === $search) {
                $summ = 0;
            }
            $index++;

class Solution {

    function numberOfSubarrays($nums, $k) {
        $j = 0;
        $i = 0;
        $count = 0;
        $ret = 0;

        foreach ($nums as $n) {
            if ($n % 2 != 0) { 
                $count += 1; 
            }

            if ($count == $k) { 
                $i = $j; 

                while ($count == $k) { 
                    if ($nums[$j] % 2 != 0) { 
                        $count -= 1; 
                    } 
                    $j += 1; 
                }
            }
            $ret += $j - $i; 
        }

        return $ret;
    }
}

function firstDayBeenInAllRooms($nextVisit) {
    $days = array_fill(0, count($nextVisit), 0);
    $day = 0;
    $base = 1000000007;
    $prev = 0;
    $added = 0;
    
    for ($i = 0; $i < count($days) - 1; $i++) {

        $prev = $nextVisit[$i];
        $added = 2 + $day - $days[$prev];

    }

class UnionFind {
    private $n;
    private $par;
    private $size;

    public function __construct($n) {
        $this->n = $n;
        $this->par = [];
        $this->size = [];
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $this->par[$i] = $i;
            $this->size[$i] = 1;
        }
    }

    public function find($x) {
        if ($this->par[$x] != $x) {
            $this->par[$x] = $this->find($this->par[$x]);
        }
        return $this->par[$x];
    }

    public function unite($x, $y) {
        $x = $this->find($x);
        $y = $this->find($y);
        if ($x == $y) {
            return;
        }
        if ($this->size[$x] > $this->size[$y]) {
            $tmp = $x;
            $x = $y;
            $y = $tmp;
        }
        $this->par[$x] = $y;
        $this->size[$y] += $this->size[$x];
    }
}

function bfs() {

    $q = new SplQueue();
    $q->enqueue($t);

    $vis[$t] = true;

    while (!$q->isEmpty()) {
        $u = $q->dequeue();

        for ($i = $head[$u]; $i; $i = $e[$i]['ne']) {
            $v = $e[$i]['to'];

            if (!$vis[$v] && $e[$i ^ 1]['cap'] > $e[$i ^ 1]['flow']) {
                $dis[$v] = $dis[$u] + 1;
                $q->enqueue($v);
                $vis[$v] = true;
            }
        }
    }
    return $vis[$s];
}

function dfs($u, $a) {
    global $cur, $t;

    if ($u == $t || $a == 0) return $a;
    $flow = 0;

    for ($i = &$cur[$u]; $i; $i = $e[$i]['ne']) {
        $v = $e[$i]['to'];

        if ($dis[$v] == $dis[$u] - 1) {
            $f = dfs($v, min($a, $e[$i]['cap'] - $e[$i]['flow']));
            $e[$i]['flow'] += $f;
            $e[$i ^ 1]['flow'] -= $f;
            $a -= $f;
            $flow += $f;

            if ($a == 0) break;
        }
    }
    return $flow;
}

    $head[$v] = $num;

<?php
class FastIO {
    private $buffer;
    private $newlines = 0;
    private $fd;
    const BUFSIZE = 8192;

    public function __construct($file) {
        $this->fd = $file;
        $this->buffer = '';
    }

    public function read() {
        while (true) {
            $b = fread($this->fd, self::BUFSIZE);
            if ($b === '') break;
            $this->buffer .= $b;
        }
        return $this->buffer;
    }

    public function readline() {
        while ($this->newlines == 0) {
            $b = fread($this->fd, self::BUFSIZE);
            $this->newlines += substr_count($b, "\n") + ($b === '');
            $this->buffer .= $b;
        }
        $this->newlines -= 1;
        $line = strtok($this->buffer, "\n");
        $this->buffer = substr($this->buffer, strlen($line) + 1);
        return $line;
    }

    public function flush() {
        // no action needed for flush
    }
}

function factorial($n) {
    if ($n == 0) return 1;
    $res = 1;
    for ($i = 1; $i <= $n; $i++) {
        $res *= $i;
    }
    return $res;
}

function npr($n, $r) {
    return $n >= $r ? factorial($n) / factorial($n - $r) : 0;
}

function ncr($n, $r) {
    return $n >= $r ? factorial($n) / (factorial($r) * factorial($n - $r)) : 0;
}

function lower_bound($li, $num) {
    $answer = -1;
    $start = 0;
    $end = count($li) - 1;
    while ($start <= $end) {
        $middle = intdiv($start + $end, 2);
        if ($li[$middle] >= $num) {
            $answer = $middle;
            $end = $middle - 1;
        } else {
            $start = $middle + 1;
        }
    }
    return $answer;
}

function upper_bound($li, $num) {
    $answer = -1;
    $start = 0;
    $end = count($li) - 1;
    while ($start <= $end) {
        $middle = intdiv($start + $end, 2);
        if ($li[$middle] <= $num) {
            $answer = $middle;
            $start = $middle + 1;
        } else {
            $end = $middle - 1;
        }
    }
    return $answer;
}

function binary_search($li, $val) {
    $ans = -1;
    $lb = 0;
    $ub = count($li) - 1;
    while ($lb <= $ub) {
        $mid = intdiv($lb + $ub, 2);
        if ($li[$mid] > $val) {
            $ub = $mid - 1;
        } elseif ($val > $li[$mid]) {
            $lb = $mid + 1;
        } else {
            $ans = $mid;
            break;
        }
    }
    return $ans;
}

function SieveOfEratosthenes($n) {
    $prime = array_fill(0, $n + 1, true);
    $li = [];
    for ($p = 2; $p * $p <= $n; $p++) {
        if ($prime[$p]) {
            for ($i = $p * $p; $i <= $n; $i += $p) {
                $prime[$i] = false;
            }
        }
    }
    for ($p = 2; $p < count($prime); $p++) {
        if ($prime[$p]) $li[] = $p;
    }
    return $li;
}

function primefactors($n) {
    $factors = [];
    while ($n % 2 == 0) {
        $factors[] = 2;
        $n /= 2;
    }
    for ($i = 3; $i <= sqrt($n); $i += 2) {
        while ($n % $i == 0) {
            $factors[] = $i;
            $n /= $i;
        }
    }
    if ($n > 2) $factors[] = $n;
    return $factors;
}

function maxSumRangeQuery($nums, $requests) {
    $count = array_fill(0, count($nums), 0);
    
    foreach ($requests as $request) {
        $i = $request[0];
        $j = $request[1];
        $count[$i] += 1;
        if ($j + 1 < count($count)) {
            $count[$j + 1] -= 1;
        }
    }
    
    $cur = 0;
    for ($k = 0; $k < count($count); $k++) {
        $cur += $count[$k];
        $count[$k] = $cur;    
    }

    // This is gonna sort nums and count
    // But in reverse
    usort($nums, fn($a, $b) => $b <=> $a);
    usort($count, fn($a, $b) => $b <=> $a);

    $result = 0;
    $mod = 10 ** 9 + 7;
    
    for ($m = 0; $m < count($nums); $m++) {
        $result += ($nums[$m] * $count[$m]) % $mod;
        $result %= $mod;  
    }

    return $result;
}

function bisect_left($array, $value) {
    $left = 0;
    $right = count($array);
    while ($left < $right) {
        $mid = (int)(($left + $right) / 2);
        if ($array[$mid] < $value) {
            $left = $mid + 1;
        } else {
            $right = $mid;
        }
    }
    return $left;
}

$yoko = array_fill(0, 1 << $n, []);
$state_ind = array_fill(0, 1 << $n, []);

for ($state = 0; $state < (1 << $n); $state++) {
    $tmp_x = [0];
    $tmp_y = [0];
    for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {

    $nn = count($tmp_x);

    foreach ($xyp as $i => [$x, $y, $p]) {
        $j = bisect_left($tmp_x, $x);
        if ($j == 0) {
            $x_m = $tmp_x[0] - $x;
        } elseif ($j == $nn) {
            $x_m = $x - $tmp_x[$nn - 1];
        } else {
            $x_m = min($x - $tmp_x[$j - 1], $tmp_x[$j] - $x);
        }
        
        $j = bisect_left($tmp_y, $y);
        if ($j == 0) {
            $y_m = $tmp_y[0] - $y;
        } elseif ($j == $mm) {
            $y_m = $y - $tmp_y[$mm - 1];
        } else {
            $y_m = min($y - $tmp_y[$j - 1], $tmp_y[$j] - $y);
        }
        
        $x_score[$i] = $x_m * $p;

function sieve($x) {
    $isprime = array_fill(0, $x, true);
    $isprime[0] = false;
    $isprime[1] = false;

    for ($i = 2; $i * $i < $x; $i++) {
        if ($isprime[$i]) {
            for ($j = $i * $i; $j < $x; $j += $i) {
                $isprime[$j] = false;
            }
        }
    }
    return $isprime;
}

function isPerfectSquare($num) {
    $sqrt = sqrt($num);
    return $sqrt == intval($sqrt);
}

function checkNumbers($numbers, $primecheck) {
    foreach ($numbers as $i) {
        if (isPerfectSquare($i)) {
            $sqrt = intval(sqrt($i));
            if ($primecheck[$sqrt]) {
                echo 'YES' . PHP_EOL;
                continue;
            } else {
                echo 'NO' . PHP_EOL;
                continue;
            }
        } else {
            echo 'NO' . PHP_EOL;
            continue;
        }
    }
}

class CustomStack {
    public $M;
    private $s;

    public function __construct($maxSize) {
        $this->M = $maxSize;
        $this->s = [];
    }

    public function push($x) {
        if (count($this->s) < $this->M) {
            array_push($this->s, $x);
        }
    }

    public function pop() {
        if (empty($this->s)) {
            return -1;
        }
        $x = array_pop($this->s);
        return $x;
    }

    public function increment($k, $val) {
        $v = [];
        while (!empty($this->s)) {
            $top = array_pop($this->s);
            array_push($v, $top);
        }
        
        $v = array_reverse($v);
        for ($i = 0; $i < min($k, count($v)); $i++) {
            $v[$i] += $val;
        }

        foreach ($v as $element) {
            array_push($this->s, $element);
        }
    }
}

function solve($a, $n) {
    $neg = 0;
    $pos = 0;
    $dist = 0;
    $zero = 0;
    
    for($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
        if ($a[$i] < 0) {
            $neg += 1;
        } elseif ($a[$i] == 0) {
            $zero += 1;
        } else {
            $pos += 1;
        }
    }

    $res = 0;

    if ($neg % 2 == 0 || ($neg % 2 == 1 && $zero > 0)) {
        for($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($a[$i] < 0) {
                $diff = abs($a[$i] + 1);
                $res += $diff;
            } else {
                $diff = abs($a[$i] - 1);
                $res += $diff;
            }
        }
        return $res;
    } else {
        for($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($a[$i] < 0) {
                $diff = abs($a[$i] + 1);
                $res += $diff;
            } else {
                $diff = abs($a[$i] - 1);
                $res += $diff;
            }
        }
        return $res + 2;
    }

function minRemoveToMakeValid($s) {
    $vis = array_fill(0, 110000, 0);
    $st = [];
    $len = strlen($s);
    $left = 0;

    for ($i = 0; $i < $len; $i++) {
        if ($s[$i] != ')') {
            array_push($st, $i);
            if ($s[$i] == '(') {
                $left++;
            }
        } else {
            if ($left > 0) {
                while (count($st) > 0) {
                    $t = array_pop($st);
                    if ($s[$t] == '(') {
                        $left--;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            } else {
                $vis[$i] = 1;
            }
        }
    }

    while (count($st) > 0) {
        $t = array_pop($st);
        if ($s[$t] == '(') {
            $vis[$t] = 1;
        }
    }

    $ans = '';
    for ($i = 0; $i < $len; $i++) {
        if ($vis[$i]) {
            continue;
        }
        $ans .= $s[$i];
    }

    return $ans;
}

function getSubstringWithEqual012($Str) {

    $b = 0;
    $c = 0;
    $ans = 0;

    $d[serialize([0, 0])] = 1;

        if ($Str[$i] == '0') {
            $a += 1;
        } elseif ($Str[$i] == '1') {
            $b += 1;
        } elseif ($Str[$i] == '2') {
            $c += 1;
        }

        $temp = serialize([$a - $b, $a - $c]);

        if (!array_key_exists($temp, $d)) {

            $d[$temp] += 1;

class TreeNode {
    public $val;
    public $left;
    public $right;
    function __construct($x) {
        $this->val = $x;
        $this->left = null;
        $this->right = null;
    }
}

class Solution {
    public function getNodeNum($root) {
        if ($root == null) {
            return 0;
        }
        $count = 1; 
        $count += $this->getNodeNum($root->left);
        $count += $this->getNodeNum($root->right);
        return $count;
    }

    public function getNode($root, $x) {
        if ($root == null) {
            return null;
        }
        if ($root->val == $x) {
            return $root;
        }
        $leftNode = $this->getNode($root->left, $x);
        if ($leftNode != null) {
            return $leftNode;
        }
        $rightNode = $this->getNode($root->right, $x);
        if ($rightNode != null) {
            return $rightNode;
        }
        return null;
    }

    public function btreeGameWinningMove($root, $n, $x) {
        if ($n == 1) {
            return false;
        }
        $first = $this->getNode($root, $x);
        $firstNum = $this->getNodeNum($first);
        // echo "firstNum: " . $firstNum . "\n"; 
        if ($firstNum <= $n / 2) {
            return true;
        }
        $leftNum = $this->getNodeNum($first->left);
        // echo "leftNum: " . $leftNum . "\n"; 
        if ($leftNum > $n / 2) {
            return true;
        }
        $rightNum = $this->getNodeNum($first->right);
        // echo "rightNum: " . $rightNum . "\n"; 
        if ($rightNum > $n / 2) {
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }
}

function solve($ar) {
    $diff = array_fill(0, count($ar), 0);
    $cur_thres = $ar[0];
    
    for ($i = 0; $i < count($ar); $i++) {
        if ($ar[$i] < $cur_thres) {
            $diff[$i] = $cur_thres - $ar[$i];
        } else {
            $cur_thres = $ar[$i];
        }
    }
    
    $max_diff = max($diff);
    
    if ($max_diff == 0) {
        return 0;
    }
    
    if (($max_diff & ($max_diff - 1)) == 0) {
        return ceil(log($max_diff, 2)) + 1;
    } else {
        return ceil(log($max_diff, 2));
    }
}

function sumOfFlooredPairs($A) {
    $mod = 1000000007;
    $N = count($A);
    $ans = 0;
    sort($A);
    
    $i = 0;
    while ($i < $N) {
        $base = $A[$i];
        $j = $i + 1;
        
        while ($j < $N && $A[$j] == $A[$j - 1]) {
            $j++;
        }
        
        $next = $j;
        $len = $j - $i;
        
        $ans = ($ans + $len + $len * ($len - 1) % $mod) % $mod;
        
        while ($j < $N) {
            $div = intdiv($A[$j], $base);
            $bound = $base * ($div + 1);
            $nextBound = lower_bound($A, $bound, $j);
            $ans = ($ans + ($nextBound - $j) * $div % $mod * $len % $mod) % $mod;
            $j = $nextBound;
        }
        
        $i = $next;
    }
    
    return $ans;
}

function lower_bound($array, $key, $start) {
    $left = $start;
    $right = count($array);
    
    while ($left < $right) {
        $mid = intdiv($left + $right, 2);
        if ($array[$mid] < $key) {
            $left = $mid + 1;
        } else {
            $right = $mid;
        }
    }
    
    return $left;
}

    $total_deletes = 0;
    $n = count($A);
    if ($n == 0) return 0;

    $m = strlen($A[0]);
    for ($j = 0; $j < $m; $j++) {

            $prev_char = $A[$i - 1][$j];
            $curr_char = $A[$i][$j];
            if ($prev_char > $curr_char) {
                $total_deletes += 1;
                $should_delete = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        // Optionally check if we should delete this column, not really needed tho
        if ($should_delete) {
            // Do nothing, already counted
        }
    }
    return $total_deletes;

$ide_ele = 0;

class SegTree {
    private $segfunc;
    private $ide_ele;
    private $num;
    private $tree;

    public function __construct($init_val, $segfunc, $ide_ele) {
        $n = count($init_val);
        $this->segfunc = $segfunc;
        $this->ide_ele = $ide_ele;
        $this->num = 1 << (intval(log($n, 2)) + 1);
        $this->tree = array_fill(0, 2 * $this->num, $ide_ele);
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $this->tree[$this->num + $i] = $init_val[$i];
        }
        
        for ($i = $this->num - 1; $i > 0; $i--) {
            $this->tree[$i] = call_user_func($this->segfunc, $this->tree[2 * $i], $this->tree[2 * $i + 1]);
        }
    }

    public function update($k, $x) {
        $k += $this->num;
        $this->tree[$k] = $x;
        while ($k > 1) {
            $this->tree[$k >> 1] = call_user_func($this->segfunc, $this->tree[$k], $this->tree[$k ^ 1]);
            $k >>= 1;
        }
    }

    public function query($l, $r) {
        $res = $this->ide_ele;
        $l += $this->num;
        $r += $this->num;
        
        while ($l < $r) {
            if ($l & 1) {
                $res = call_user_func($this->segfunc, $res, $this->tree[$l]);
                $l++;
            }
            if ($r & 1) {
                $r--;
                $res = call_user_func($this->segfunc, $res, $this->tree[$r]);
            }
            $l >>= 1;
            $r >>= 1;
        }
        return $res;
    }
}

        $root_idx = find($tree, $idx);
        return $root_idx;

function unite($tree, $x, $y, $w) {
    global $tree_rank;
    $x_root_idx = find($tree, $x);
    $y_root_idx = find($tree, $y);
    if ($x_root_idx != $y_root_idx) {
        if ($tree_rank[$x_root_idx] < $tree_rank[$y_root_idx]) {
            $tree[$x_root_idx] = array($y_root_idx, $w);
        } else {
            $tree[$y_root_idx] = array($x_root_idx, $w);
            if ($tree_rank[$x_root_idx] == $tree_rank[$y_root_idx]) {
                $tree_rank[$x_root_idx] = $tree_rank[$x_root_idx] + 1;
            }
        }
    }
}

function same($tree, $x, $y) {
    $x_root_idx = find($tree, $x);
    $y_root_idx = find($tree, $y);
    return $x_root_idx == $y_root_idx;
}

			}
		} else {
			return binarySearch($arr, $l, $mid - 1, $x, $key);
		}
	} else {

	}
}

function shortestBridge($A) {
    $dx = array(-1, 0, 0, 1);
    $dy = array(0, -1, 1, 0);
    
    $islandA = array();
    $queue = array();
    $depthQ = array();
    $R = count($A);
    $C = count($A[0]);
    $visited = array_fill(0, $R, array_fill(0, $C, false));
    
    $seenIsland = false;
    for ($i = 0; $i < $R; $i++) {
        for ($j = 0; $j < $C; $j++) {
            if ($visited[$i][$j]) continue;
            if ($A[$i][$j] == 1) {
                $stack = array();
                array_push($stack, $i * 101 + $j);
                while (!empty($stack)) {
                    $curr = array_pop($stack);
                    $currI = intval($curr / 101);
                    $currJ = $curr % 101;
                    
                    if ($seenIsland) {
                        array_push($depthQ, 0);
                        array_push($queue, $currI * 101 + $currJ);
                    } else {
                        $islandA[$currI * 101 + $currJ] = true;
                    }
                    
                    if ($visited[$currI][$currJ]) continue;
                    $visited[$currI][$currJ] = true;
                    
                    for ($k = 0; $k < 4; $k++) {
                        $newI = $currI + $dx[$k];
                        $newJ = $currJ + $dy[$k];
                        
                        if ($newI < 0 || $newI >= $R || $newJ < 0 || $newJ >= $C) continue;
                        if ($A[$newI][$newJ] == 0) continue;

                        array_push($stack, $newI * 101 + $newJ);
                    }
                }
                $seenIsland = true;
            }
        }
    }
    
    $visited = array_fill(0, $R, array_fill(0, $C, false));
    while (!empty($queue)) {
        $curr = array_shift($queue);
        $currI = intval($curr / 101);
        $currJ = $curr % 101;
        
        $depth = array_shift($depthQ);
        
        if ($visited[$currI][$currJ]) continue;
        $visited[$currI][$currJ] = true;
        
        if (isset($islandA[$curr])) {
            return $depth - 1;
        }
        
        for ($k = 0; $k < 4; $k++) {
            $newI = $currI + $dx[$k];
            $newJ = $currJ + $dy[$k];
            if ($newI < 0 || $newI >= $R || $newJ < 0 || $newJ >= $C) continue;
            if ($visited[$newI][$newJ]) continue;
            
            array_push($queue, $newI * 101 + $newJ);
            array_push($depthQ, $depth + 1);
        }
    }
    
    return -1;
}

class Solution {

    function permutaion($n) {
        $perm = $this->getPermutations(strval($n));
        $c = 0;
        $sm = 0;
        foreach ($perm as $i) {
            $x = implode('', $i);
            $sm += intval($x);
            $c += 1;
        }
        return array($c, $sm);
    }

    function getPermutations($string) {
        $result = array();
        $this->permuteHelper(str_split($string), 0, $result);
        $result = array_map("serialize", $result);
        $result = array_unique($result);
        return array_map("unserialize", $result);
    }

    function permuteHelper($array, $start, &$result) {
        if ($start >= count($array)) {
            $result[] = $array;
        } else {
            for ($i = $start; $i < count($array); $i++) {
                $this->swap($array, $start, $i);
                $this->permuteHelper($array, $start + 1, $result);
                $this->swap($array, $start, $i);
            }
        }
    }

    function swap(&$array, $i, $j) {
        $temp = $array[$i];
        $array[$i] = $array[$j];
        $array[$j] = $temp;
    }
}

class Solution {

    function heapify_up($arr, $i) {
        $parent = intval(($i - 1) / 2);
        if ($i > 0 && $arr[$i] > $arr[$parent]) {
            $tmp = $arr[$i];
            $arr[$i] = $arr[$parent];
            $arr[$parent] = $tmp;
            $this->heapify_up($arr, $parent);
        }
    }

    function heapify_down($arr, $n, $curr) {
        $Max_val = $curr;
        $left = $curr * 2 + 1;
        $right = $curr * 2 + 2;
        
        if ($left < $n && $arr[$left] > $arr[$Max_val]) {
            $Max_val = $left;
        }
        
        if ($right < $n && $arr[$right] > $arr[$Max_val]) {
            $Max_val = $right;
        }
        
        if ($Max_val != $curr) {
            $tmp = $arr[$Max_val];
            $arr[$Max_val] = $arr[$curr];
            $arr[$curr] = $tmp;
            $this->heapify_down($arr, $n, $Max_val);
        }
    }

    function buildHeap($arr, $n) {
        $newarr = array();
        array_push($newarr, $arr[0]);
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < count($arr); $i++) {
            if ($i == 0) {
                continue;
            }
            array_push($newarr, $arr[$i]);
            $this->heapify_up($newarr, count($newarr) - 1);
        }
        
        return $newarr;
    }

    function HeapSort($arr, $n) {
        $length = count($arr);
        $values = $this->buildHeap($arr, count($arr));
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < count($values); $i++) {
            $arr[$i] = $values[$i];
        }
        
        $i = 1;
        while ($i < count($arr)) {
            $tmp = $arr[0];
            $arr[0] = $arr[$length - $i];
            $arr[$length - $i] = $tmp;
            $this->heapify_down($arr, $length - $i, 0);
            $i++;
        }
    }
}

function calculateD($k, $d) {
    if ($k % $d == 0) {
        $d = (int)($k / $d) * $d;
    } else {
        $d = (int)($k / $d + 1) * $d;
    }
    return $d;
}

function calculateP($k, $d) {
    $p = $k + ($d - $k) / 2;
    return $p;
}

function calculateZ($t, $p, $d, $k) {
    $z = (int)($t / $p) * $d;
    $e = (int)($t / $p) * $p;

    if ($t - $e < $k) {
        $z += $t - $e;
    } else {
        $z += $k + ($t - $e - $k) * 2;
    }
    
    return $z;
}

        if ($this->index >= $this->total) {
            $this->index = 0;
            $this->total = fread(STDIN, 1024);  // Simulate input reading
            if ($this->total <= 0) return -1;
            $this->buf = array_merge(unpack('C*', $this->total));
        }

        return $this->buf[$this->index++];
    }

    public function scanInt(): int {
        $integer = 0;
        $n = $this->scan();

        while ($this->isWhiteSpace($n)) {
            $n = $this->scan();
        }

        $neg = 1;
        if ($n === '-') {
            $neg = -1;
            $n = $this->scan();
        }

        while (!$this->isWhiteSpace($n)) {
            if ($n >= '0' && $n <= '9') {
                $integer *= 10;
                $integer += $n - '0';
                $n = $this->scan();
            } else {
                throw new Exception("InputMismatchException");
            }
        }
        return $neg * $integer;
    }

    public function scanString(): string {
        $sb = "";
        $n = $this->scan();

        while ($this->isWhiteSpace($n)) {
            $n = $this->scan();
        }

        while (!$this->isWhiteSpace($n)) {
            $sb .= chr($n);
            $n = $this->scan();
        }
        return $sb;
    }

    private function isWhiteSpace(int $n): bool {
        return in_array($n, [32, 10, 13, 9, -1]);
    }
}

function sortArray(&$arr, $l, $r) {
    if ($l == $r) {
        return;
    }

    $mid = intval(($l + $r) / 2);
    sortArray($arr, $l, $mid);
    sortArray($arr, $mid + 1, $r);
    mergeArray($arr, $l, $mid, $mid + 1, $r);
}

function mergeArray(&$arr, $l1, $r1, $l2, $r2) {
    $tmp = [];
    $indx1 = $l1;
    $indx2 = $l2;

    for ($i = 0; $i < $r2 - $l1 + 1; $i++) {
        if ($indx1 > $r1) {
            $tmp[$i] = $arr[$indx2++];
            continue;
        }
        if ($indx2 > $r2) {
            $tmp[$i] = $arr[$indx1++];
            continue;
        }
        if ($arr[$indx1] < $arr[$indx2]) {
            $tmp[$i] = $arr[$indx1++];
            continue;
        }
        $tmp[$i] = $arr[$indx2++];
    }

    for ($i = 0, $j = $l1; $i < count($tmp); $i++, $j++) {
        $arr[$j] = $tmp[$i];
    }
}

function ncr($n, $r, $fact, $mod) {
    $ncr = $fact[$n];
    $ncr *= inv($fact[$r], $mod);
    $ncr %= $mod;
    $ncr *= inv($fact[$n - $r], $mod);
    $ncr %= $mod;
    return $ncr;
}

function inv($a, $n) {
    $t1 = 0; $t2 = 1; $r1 = $n; $r2 = $a;

    while (true) {
        $q = intval($r1 / $r2);
        $r = $r1 % $r2;
        $t = $t1 - $q * $t2;

        $r1 = $r2;
        $r2 = $r;
        $t1 = $t2;
        $t2 = $t;

        if ($r2 == 0) {
            break;
        }
    }

    if ($r1 != 1) {
        return -1;
    }

    $t1 %= $n;
    if ($t1 < 0) {
        $t1 += $n;
    }

    return $t1;
}

function find4Numbers($A, $n, $X) {
    $a = combinations($A, 4);
    foreach ($a as $i) {
        list($x, $y, $x1, $y1) = $i; 
        if ($x + $y + $x1 + $y1 == $X) {
            return 1; 
        } 
    }
    return 0; 
}

function combinations($array, $k) {
    $result = [];
    $n = count($array);
    if ($k > $n) {
        return $result; 
    } 
    $indexes = array_fill(0, $k, 0); 
    for ($i = 0; $i < $k; $i++) {
        $indexes[$i] = $i; 
    } 
    while (true) {
        $temp = [];
        foreach ($indexes as $index) {
            $temp[] = $array[$index]; 
        }
        $result[] = $temp; 

        $i = $k - 1; 
        while ($i >= 0 && $indexes[$i] == $n - $k + $i) {
            $i--; 
        } 
        if ($i < 0) {
            break; 
        }
        $indexes[$i]++; 
        for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $k; $j++) {
            $indexes[$j] = $indexes[$j - 1] + 1; 
        } 
    }
    return $result; 
}

class Solution {
    public function sortArrayByParityII($A) {
        $N = count($A);
        $B = array_fill(0, $N, 0);
        $o = 1;
        $e = 0;
        
        foreach ($A as $a) {
            if ($a % 2 == 0) {
                $B[$e] = $a;
                $e += 2;
            } else {
                $B[$o] = $a;
                $o += 2;
            }
        }
        return $B;
    }
}
